CustomField.description: Snapshot of the discount % negotiated on the SOURCE quote/contract line this renewal line was renewed from. Stamped once by RLM_DeltaTermBuilderController.restoreClonedLineFidelity when the renewal is created, from the matched source line's Discount. Frozen (never re-priced or edited) so Term Builder can show the previous value alongside the rep's live, editable Discount for comparison.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Read-only. The discount agreed on the previous contract line, for comparison against the renewal's new discount.
CustomField.label: Prior Discount %
